title: Another To Neptune.
content:
Mighty Neptune, may it please
    Thee, the rector of the seas,
    That my barque may safely run
    Through thy watery region;
    And a tunny-fish shall be
    Offered up with thanks to thee.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Another To Neptune."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
